index.lede: A fitness app built like a workshop notebook: precise, editorial, brutalist. No confetti. No jargon. Just your body, your numbers, your progress.

stack.title: Stack reset
stack.desc: Next 16 · React 19 · Tailwind v4 · shadcn new-york. Legacy archived.

design.title: Design system live
design.desc: CSS-first tokens + Fraunces / Manrope / JetBrains Mono. Signature orange preserved.

next.title: Up next
next.desc: Supabase auth · i18n middleware FR/NL/EN · dashboard · live session.

hero.kicker: The workshop notebook for your training
hero.lede: Track every rep, every watt, every calorie. No bullshit. No ads. No empty gamification. Just your numbers and your progress.

logging.title: Log every rep, every set.
logging.body: Strength and cardio in a single app. Sets, reps, weight, RPE. For the rower: SPM, watts. For running: pace, elevation. Live mode with rest timer.

progress.title: See where you're going.
progress.body: Charts of estimated 1RM, weekly volume, frequency per muscle group. Compare your cycles. Spot plateaus before they settle in.

nutrition.title: Count macros. The Belgian way.
nutrition.body: Scan the barcode of your Colruyt, Delhaize or Carrefour product. Nutri-Score, macros, ingredients. Open Food Facts (3M+ products) at the core.

coach.title: A coach that listens.
coach.body: Plans adapted to your equipment, your time, your goals. Tips on plateaus. No guilt-tripping, no anxiety-inducing alerts.

log.title: You log your session.
log.body: During or after, doesn't matter. A few taps and it's done. The app remembers everything: your last weight, your last reps, your records.

track.title: The app remembers everything.
track.body: Your data stays yours (GDPR-first, hosted in Europe). Multi-device sync. Full export whenever you want.

progress.title: You see your progress.
progress.body: No vanity metrics. Just what matters: volume, intensity, frequency, sleep, nutrition. You decide what to change.

vs.heading: Why not
vs.lede: Each app excels in its lane. IronTrack bridges them: serious strength training, precise cardio, Belgian nutrition — without forced subscription or ads.
vs.disclaimer: * Comparison based on public free tiers as of April 2026

manifesto.quote: "The iron never lies. Neither do your numbers."
manifesto.body: We've seen too many fitness apps that turn training into a video game, guilt-trip you for missing a session, or sell your data. IronTrack does the opposite: a sober, precise tool that respects you.

placeholder.label: COMING NEXT
placeholder.body: The real dashboard is on its way: your last session, your records, your upcoming sessions, your progress graphs.

login.metaDescription: Sign in to IronTrack with Google or with your email and password.
login.title: Welcome back.
login.lede: Sign in with Google or with your email. That's it.
login.editorialQuote: "The iron never lies. Neither do your numbers."
login.editorialAttribution: A fitness app built like a workshop notebook. No empty gamification, no anxiety-driven notifications. Just your data, your progress, your routine.

form.toSignin: Already have an account? Sign in
form.hint: By continuing, you accept our terms and privacy policy (GDPR).

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox.
checkEmail.body: If the address is valid, you'll receive a link in a few seconds. Don't forget to check spam.
checkEmail.hint: The link may open in a new tab (Gmail, Outlook). No worries: this tab will update automatically as soon as you're signed in.

errors.emailInvalid: This email address is not valid.
errors.passwordWeak: Add at least one uppercase, one lowercase and one digit.
errors.emailTaken: An account already exists with this email. Sign in.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.

error.title: Invalid or expired link.
error.body: This magic link no longer works. Request a new one.
